arts.ttl: Report: Club believe £350k-a-week Liverpool star will be their big signing in summer
arts.sum: Liverpool attacker Mohamed Salah has been linked with the move away from the club with his contract due to expire in the summer. The 32-year-old has not been able to agree on a new deal with the club yet, and Saudi Arabian clubs are hoping to secure his signature. According to journalist Miguel Rico, Al-Ittihad […] The post Report: Club believe £350k-a-week Liverpool star will be their big signing in summer appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Trent Alexander-Arnold scores stunning goal against Accrington Stanley - as Liverpool star answers his critics after nightmare Man United display amid contract saga
arts.sum: Trent Alexander-Arnold scored a stunning goal in Liverpool's FA Cup clash with Accrington Stanley.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot reveals reason for picking 16-year-old sensation Rio Ngumoha in starting XI for Liverpool's FA Cup tie with Accrington Stanley
arts.sum: Arne Slot has revealed the reason behind his shock decision to hand 16-year-old academy star Rio Ngumoha his first start for Liverpool.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot offers his verdict on David Moyes' sensational return to arch-rivals Everton - as Liverpool boss praises former Toffees manager Sean Dyche after midweek axe
arts.sum: Liverpool manager Arne Slot has voiced his opinion on David Moyes' incredible return as manager of rivals Everton. It has been an eventful week at Goodison Park, with Everton sacking Sean Dyche on Thursday.

arts.ttl: Liverpool contact fullback’s agent as they look for Robertson successor – €20-25m to complete deal
arts.sum: Liverpool have been in contact with El Hadji Malick Diouf’s agent about a move as they seek the long-term successor to Andy Robertson. That’s according to D Sports and Infotbal, who both say Liverpool are interested in the Slavia Prague youngster. First D Sports, who report that Diouf is ‘at the heart of many desires’ The post Liverpool contact fullback’s agent as they look for Robertson successor – €20-25m to complete deal appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Liverpool ready to break their transfer record for 23-year-old Man United, Chelsea target
arts.sum: Liverpool are looking to improve their attacking unit with the signing of the Napoli winger Khvicha Kvaratskhelia. They are prepared to offer a fee of around £97.5 million to get the deal done. The Reds are willing to include Federico Chiesa in a deal for the Georgian International as well, as per Fichajes. The 23-year-old […] The post Liverpool ready to break their transfer record for 23-year-old Man United, Chelsea target appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Who is Rio Ngumoha? Meet the 16-year-old wonderkid making his first Liverpool start in FA Cup clash with Accrington Stanley after joining from rivals Chelsea
arts.sum: The Reds face Accrington Stanley in the FA Cup third round this afternoon. Here is everything you need to know about Liverpool's 16-year-old wonderkid Rio Ngumoha.

arts.ttl: Rodrigo Bentancur pictured back home as he poses in touching family photo two days on from worrying on-pitch collapse during Tottenham's win over Liverpool
arts.sum: Bentancur fell to the ground unchallenged during the first half of the Carabao Cup semi-final tie at Tottenham Hotspur Stadium and sustained concussion.

arts.ttl: Rio Ngumoha makes Liverpool debut as Arne Slot makes eight changes for Accrington Stanley
arts.sum: Liverpool team news confirmed from Anfield as Arne Slot makes eight changes in total for the visit of Accrington Stanley in the third round of the FA Cup

arts.ttl: Liverpool v Accrington Stanley: FA Cup third round – live
arts.sum: FA Cup news from the 12.15pm GMT kick-off at Anfield Live scoreboard | Subscribe to Football Daily | Email Scott Stanley captain Shaun Whalley is asked by ITV’s Gabriel Clarke about the possibility of scoring a goal at the Kop end. A broad smile immediately plays across his face. “Yeah I’d love that,” Whalley replies. Then, with a twinkle in the eye, he adds: “I probably wouldn’t celebrate to be honest. I’ve got too many mates in there!” A laugh as he walks off, dreaming of all possibilities. The magic of the cup, right there. Accrington Stanley manager John Doolan speaks to ITV. “Just excitement … you can see the drive in them … it’s a fantastic day … we just want to get going … it’s special, isn’t it … the lads who got us three points last week get the shirt … you can’t go on sentiment … [former Liverpool academy player Liam Coyle] is a fantastic player and I’m sure he’ll get on the pitch at some point … you’ve got to do a professional job … Liverpool are a fantastic team … we’ve got to try to impose our game on them … look after the ball a bit better … match them and see where that takes us … we have a game-plan … we’ll do our best.” Continue reading...
